message.content:
PASS  
The pagination text shows "Affichage de 6 à 8 sur 8 éléments" (confirming page 2, as it displays items 6–8 of 8 total). The "2" button in the pagination controls is highlighted in emerald/green (active), while "1" is not active. The table displays 3 students (Boubacar Traoré, Mariam Cissé, Lassana Touré) — the remaining 3 students (not the first 5), matching the expected content for page 2. All checks pass.
